name: SPIFFE/SPIRE
description: SPIFFE/SPIRE — CNCF identity framework and reference implementation for workload identity across infrastructure.

seo.title: SPIFFE/SPIRE — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: SPIFFE/SPIRE: SPIFFE/SPIRE — CNCF identity framework and reference implementation for workload identity across infrastructure.

when_to_use: Workload identity issuance for Kubernetes pod-to-pod mTLS
Cross-platform service identity federation for multi-cloud
Short-lived SVID certificate rotation without manual ops
Zero-trust service mesh identity without static secrets
OIDC federation from SPIFFE identity for cloud provider auth

pros: Works across K8s, VMs, bare metal
cons: Not a drop-in replacement for vaults
review.verdict: The serious answer to workload identity; plan on real engineering investment to deploy it well.
review.best_for: Platform teams building zero-trust identity across heterogeneous infra.
review.not_for: Small teams whose identity needs are solved by cloud IAM.
